name: Specter Desktop
description: Multisig with hardware wallets made easy
compose:
name: slashnode-specter-desktop
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/cryptoadvance/specter-desktop:v2.1.9
    container_name: specter-desktop
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command:
      - '--host=0.0.0.0'
      - '--specter-data-folder=/data'
    environment:
      BTC_RPC_USER: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_USER
      BTC_RPC_PASSWORD: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PASS
      BTC_RPC_HOST: $APP_BITCOIN_NODE_IP
      BTC_RPC_PORT: $APP_BITCOIN_RPC_PORT
      BTC_RPC_PROTOCOL: http
    volumes:
      - web_data:/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:25441:25441
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data:
    name: slashnode-specter-desktop_web_data
